title: Context Pack
description: Primary input artifact for the Plan Gate. Must pass pre-gate validation before any panel call.

task_summary.description: What the user wants changed and why.

acceptance_criteria.description: Objectively checkable outcomes that prove the task is done.

known_constraints.description: Hard constraints: stable APIs, perf budgets, compatibility, deadlines.

repo_context.description: Repo slug, stack, entry points, build/test commands.

external_freshness_needed.description: True if the task depends on current external facts (docs, advisories, breaking changes).
